case_title: JASON JUNGREIS VS. MICHELE L. MCGILL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JUNGREIS, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT MCGILL, MICHELE L.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUNGREIS, JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGILL, MICHELE L. $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAR-27-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JASON JUNGREIS. DEFENDANT MICHELE L. MCGILL DID NOT APPEAR. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF MAR. 27, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
